title: GTM Regulatory Outlook — Americas — Q2 FY2026 (May – July 2026)
summary: The United States dominates Americas regulatory activity with 16 simultaneous federal and state-level actions converging on stablecoin licensing, AML/CFT modernization, and DeFi enforcement through September 2026. FinCEN's Bank Secrecy Act reform closes for public comment June 9—the most fundamental restructuring of financial institution AML programs in two decades. Canada, Argentina, Chile, Colombia, and Cayman Islands are finalizing VASP registration regimes in Q3/Q4, creating concentrated com
